section: 23-1. REACTOR DESIGN*
text: 23-1.7 Maintenance and repair provisions.

section: 23-1. REACTOR DESIGN*
text: (1) If maintenance or repair to a component is required, the entire component will be removed from the system and a new one inserted.

section: 23-1. REACTOR DESIGN*
text: (2) All connections between components will be made in one area, fully biologically shielded from the components themselves.

section: 23-1. REACTOR DESIGN*
text: (3) Both mechanical and welded connections are being studied, with a view toward the ease with which connections can be made and broken both directly and remotely.
